intro: Pauletia longicuspis, also known as Pauletia, is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the family Malpighiaceae. Traditionally, Pauletia longicuspis is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in wound healing, reducing fever, and protecting against oxidative stress. The most common herbal preparations made with Pauletia longicuspis include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including infections and skin conditions.
